g.text: Dashboard · Chat · Document Vault · Settings UI
Pydantic v2 · Rate Limiter · CORS · JWT Auth Middleware
100% Deterministic eligibility — LLMs never decide legal outcomes
PostgreSQL RLS — all data scoped to authenticated user_id
Zero PII logging — names, phones, addresses stripped from all logs
Short-lived signed URLs (300s TTL) for document access
CORS allowlist enforcement — no wildcard origins in production
Anti-prompt injection guardrails on all chat endpoints
